title: rubus hirtus var. irrufatus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. irrufatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a subspecies of the raspberry plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. irrufatus include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of arthritis, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
